```{r}
combined <- combined %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      -coefficient,
      ~ gsub(" \\(", "\n(", .x)
    )
  )


write_csv(combined, "output/Table 1.csv")
```

### Smear positive analysis 

Prepare the dataset for smear positive modelling.

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE}
cleanRuralitySmrDF0 <- smrPosIndicator("rurality") %>% filter(rurality.smr.analysis.indicator !="none")

cleanRuralitySmrDF <- cleanRuralitySmrDF0 %>% 
              filter(rurality.smr.analysis.indicator != "none") %>% 
              mutate("id" = row_number(),

           adj.prev100k.smear.positive.tb.urban = adj.prev100k.smear.positive.tb.urban/1e5,
           adj.prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.urban = adj.prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.urban/1e5,
           adj.prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.urban = adj.prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.urban/1e5,
           
           adj.prev100k.smear.positive.tb.rural = adj.prev100k.smear.positive.tb.rural/1e5,
           adj.prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.rural = adj.prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.rural/1e5,
           adj.prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.rural = adj.prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.rural/1e5,
           
           prev100k.smear.positive.tb.urban = prev100k.smear.positive.tb.urban/1e5,
           prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.urban = prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.urban/1e5,
           prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.urban = prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.urban/1e5,
           
           prev100k.smear.positive.tb.rural = prev100k.smear.positive.tb.rural/1e5,
           prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.rural = prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.rural/1e5,
           prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.rural = prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.rural/1e5) %>%
    select(id,
           covidence.id, 
           figure.id.yr, 
           study.geography, 
           title.extracted,
           study.country,
           WHO.region,
           study.start.year, 
           study.end.year, 
           ends_with("urban"), ends_with("rural"),
           rurality.smr.analysis.indicator) %>%
    
    mutate("tempPrevUrban" =  case_when(rurality.smr.analysis.indicator == 
                                           "adj.prev100k.ci.smear.positive.tb" ~ adj.prev100k.smear.positive.tb.urban,
                                       rurality.smr.analysis.indicator == 
                                           "prev100k.ci.smear.positive.tb" ~ prev100k.smear.positive.tb.urban, 
                                       rurality.smr.analysis.indicator == 
                                           "n.smear.positive.tb" ~ n.smear.positive.tb.urban/n.participants.urban,
                                        rurality.smr.analysis.indicator == 
                                           "prev100k.smear.positive.tb" ~ prev100k.smear.positive.tb.urban),
           "tempPrevRural" = case_when(rurality.smr.analysis.indicator == 
                                            "adj.prev100k.ci.smear.positive.tb" ~ adj.prev100k.smear.positive.tb.rural,
                                        rurality.smr.analysis.indicator == 
                                            "prev100k.ci.smear.positive.tb" ~ prev100k.smear.positive.tb.rural, 
                                       rurality.smr.analysis.indicator == 
                                           "n.smear.positive.tb" ~ n.smear.positive.tb.rural/n.participants.rural,
                                       rurality.smr.analysis.indicator == 
                                           "prev100k.smear.positive.tb" ~ prev100k.smear.positive.tb.rural)) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(tempPrevRural,tempPrevUrban), 
                 names_to = "Rurality", 
                 values_to = "Adjusted Prevalence", 
                 names_prefix = "tempPrev") %>% 
    mutate("Standard Error" = case_when(rurality.smr.analysis.indicator == "adj.prev100k.ci.smear.positive.tb" & 
                                            Rurality == "Urban" ~ (adj.prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.urban-
                                                                 adj.prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.urban)/3.92,
                                        rurality.smr.analysis.indicator == "adj.prev100k.ci.smear.positive.tb" & 
                                            Rurality == "Rural" ~ (adj.prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.rural-
                                                                   adj.prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.rural)/3.92,
                                       
                                        rurality.smr.analysis.indicator == "prev100k.ci.smear.positive.tb" & 
                                            Rurality == "Urban" ~ (prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.urban-
                                                                 prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.urban)/3.92,
                                        rurality.smr.analysis.indicator == "prev100k.ci.smear.positive.tb" & 
                                            Rurality == "Rural" ~ (prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.rural-
                                                                   prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.rural)/3.92,
                                        rurality.smr.analysis.indicator %in% c("n.smear.positive.tb","prev100k.smear.positive.tb") & Rurality == "Urban" ~ 
                                            sqrt((`Adjusted Prevalence`*(1-`Adjusted Prevalence`))/n.participants.urban),
                                        rurality.smr.analysis.indicator  %in% c("n.smear.positive.tb","prev100k.smear.positive.tb") & Rurality == "Rural" ~ 
                                            sqrt((`Adjusted Prevalence`*(1-`Adjusted Prevalence`))/n.participants.rural)),
  
           "Phi" = (`Adjusted Prevalence`/`Standard Error`^2) - (`Adjusted Prevalence`/`Standard Error`)^2 - 1, 
           "LogOdds" = log(`Adjusted Prevalence`/(1-`Adjusted Prevalence`)), 
           "LogOddsStandardError" = case_when(rurality.smr.analysis.indicator == "adj.prev100k.ci.smear.positive.tb" &
                                                  Rurality == "Urban" ~ (log(adj.prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.urban/
                                                                           (1-adj.prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.urban)) -
                                                                       log(adj.prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.urban /
                                                                               (1-adj.prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.urban)))/3.92,
                                              rurality.smr.analysis.indicator == "adj.prev100k.ci.smear.positive.tb" &
                                                  Rurality == "Rural" ~ (log(adj.prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.rural/
                                                                             (1-adj.prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.rural)) -
                                                                         log(adj.prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.rural /
                                                                                 (1-adj.prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.rural)))/3.92,
                                                 rurality.smr.analysis.indicator == "prev100k.ci.smear.positive.tb" &
                                                     Rurality == "Urban" ~ (log(prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.urban/
                                                                          (1-prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.urban)) -
                                                                      log(prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.urban /
                                                                          (1-prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.urban)))/3.92,
                                                 rurality.smr.analysis.indicator == "prev100k.ci.smear.positive.tb" &
                                                     Rurality == "Rural" ~ (log(prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.rural/
                                                                            (1-prev100k.ci.upper.smear.positive.tb.rural)) -
                                                                        log(prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.rural /
                                                                            (1-prev100k.ci.lower.smear.positive.tb.rural)))/3.92, 
                                            rurality.smr.analysis.indicator %in% c("n.smear.positive.tb", "prev100k.smear.positive.tb") & Rurality == "Urban" ~ 
                                            log(1/(n.participants.urban*`Adjusted Prevalence`*(1-`Adjusted Prevalence`)))^2,
                                        rurality.smr.analysis.indicator  %in% c("n.smear.positive.tb", "prev100k.smear.positive.tb") & Rurality == "Rural" ~ 
                                            log(1/(n.participants.rural*`Adjusted Prevalence`*(1-`Adjusted Prevalence`)))^2)) %>% 
                                mutate(natRep = ifelse(study.geography == "Nationally representative", "Yes", "No"),
                                       WHO.region = gsub("\\(WHO\\)", "region", WHO.region),
                                       study.start.year = as.integer(study.start.year),
                                       study.end.year = as.integer(study.end.year),
                                       year = case_when(
                                                        !is.na(study.start.year) & !is.na(study.end.year) &
                                                          study.start.year == study.end.year ~ study.start.year,

                                                        !is.na(study.start.year) & !is.na(study.end.year) &
                                                          study.start.year != study.end.year ~
                                                            round((study.start.year + study.end.year) / 2),

                                                        TRUE ~ NA_real_))  %>% 
                                                          filter(LogOddsStandardError < Inf)
```


```{r}
cleanRuralitySmrDF0 %>%
  summarise(n_eligible = sum(n.eligible.rurality.total, na.rm = TRUE),
            n_participants = sum(n.participants.rural, n.participants.urban, na.rm = TRUE))
```

Prepare the dataset for smear-positive analysis

```{r}
smrModelDF <- cleanRuralitySmrDF %>%
    select(id, WHO.region, study.country, Rurality, year, natRep, LogOdds, LogOddsStandardError) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Rurality,
                values_from = c(LogOdds, LogOddsStandardError),
                names_sep = "_") %>%
    mutate(
        logOR = LogOdds_Urban - LogOdds_Rural,
        logOR_se = sqrt(LogOddsStandardError_Urban^2 + LogOddsStandardError_Rural^2) 
    ) 
```


### Smear positive descriptive statistics

```{r}
print(paste(dim(cleanRuralitySmrDF0)[1], "unique surveys with urban/rural-stratified smear positive TB"))

# sort(unique(cleanRuralitySmrDF0$title.extracted))
print(paste(length(unique(cleanRuralitySmrDF0$title.extracted))-1, "unique publications"))

print(paste(sum(!is.na(cleanRuralitySmrDF0$n.participants.rural)), "studies report participant numbers totaling", 
            sum(cleanRuralitySmrDF0$n.participants.rural, cleanRuralitySmrDF0$n.participants.urban, na.rm = TRUE), "participants"))

print(paste0(round(sum(cleanRuralitySmrDF0$n.participants.urban, na.rm=TRUE)/sum(cleanRuralitySmrDF0$n.participants.rural, cleanRuralitySmrDF0$n.participants.urban, na.rm = TRUE)*100, 2), "% of participants were urban" ))
```

We will also exclude the Eastern Mediterranean surveys from the regional model.

```{r}

smrModelDF <- smrModelDF %>%
    mutate(year = as.integer(year),
            year_z = year - round(mean(year, na.rm=TRUE)))

smrModelDF_noEM <- smrModelDF %>%
    filter(WHO.region !="Eastern Mediterranean region") 
```

```{r}
year_zero_smr <- smrModelDF_noEM %>% 
  select(year, year_z) %>% arrange(year_z) %>%
  filter(year_z==0) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  pull(year)
```


#### Smear positive: Model 1: Smear positive main effect 

Model specification
```{r, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, cache=TRUE}
mainEffectSmrMod <- brms::brm(formula = logOR | se(logOR_se, sigma=TRUE) ~ 
                           1  + (1 | study.country/id),
                       data = smrModelDF,
                       prior = prior(student_t(7, 0, 1.5), class = Intercept) +
                       prior(exponential(2), class = sd),
                       family = gaussian(),
                       backend = "cmdstanr",
                       control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99),
                       chains = 4,
                       cores = 4,
                       iter = 4000)
```

Summarize and check 

```{r}
summary(mainEffectSmrMod)
plot(mainEffectSmrMod)
```

Prediction

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE}

nd <- smrModelDF %>%
      select(study.country, LogOdds_Rural) %>%
      mutate(logOR_se=1)

mainEffectSmrModEst <- add_epred_draws(object = mainEffectSmrMod,
                                 newdata=nd,
                                 re_formula = ~ 1) %>% 
                    mutate(urRatio = exp(.epred),
                           type="Posterior mean and 95% credible interval") 
```

Main estimate
```{r}
mainEffectSmrModEst %>% ungroup %>% mean_qi(urRatio)
```

#### Smear positive:  Model 2: Smear positive effect by WHO region model. Note here we exclude the EM countries

Model specification
```{r, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE, cache=TRUE}
regionEffectSmrMod <- brms::brm(formula = logOR | se(logOR_se, sigma=TRUE) ~ 
                           1  + (1|WHO.region/id),
                       data = smrModelDF_noEM,
                       prior = prior(student_t(7, 0, 1.5), class = Intercept) +
                           # prior(normal(0, 10), class = b) +
                           prior(exponential(2), class = sd),
                       family = gaussian(),
                       backend = "cmdstanr",
                       control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99),
                       chains = 4,
                       cores = 4,
                       iter = 4000)
```

Summarize and check 

```{r}
summary(regionEffectSmrMod)
plot(regionEffectSmrMod)
```

Prediction

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE}
ndRegion <- smrModelDF_noEM %>%
      select(WHO.region, LogOdds_Rural) %>%
      mutate(logOR_se=1)

regionEffectSmrModEst <- add_epred_draws(object = regionEffectSmrMod,
                                 newdata=ndRegion,
                                 re_formula = ~ 1 + (1|WHO.region)) %>% 
                       mutate(urRatio = exp(.epred),
                           type="Posterior mean and 95% credible interval") 
```

Main estimate
```{r}
regionEffectSmrModEst %>% group_by(WHO.region) %>% mean_qi(urRatio)
```

```{r}
empirical_smr_prev <- smrModelDF_noEM %>%
    transmute(
        id,
        WHO.region = WHO.region,
        year_z = year_z,
        logOR_se,
        natRep = natRep,
        p_rural_empirical = plogis(LogOdds_Rural),
        p_urban_empirical = plogis(LogOdds_Urban),
        or_empirical = p_urban_empirical / p_rural_empirical,
        or_empirical = (p_urban_empirical / (1 - p_urban_empirical)) / 
            (p_rural_empirical / (1 - p_rural_empirical))  # odds ratio
    ) %>% mutate(type = "Survey-specific ratios",
                 type2 = "Survey-specific smear positive TB prevalence")

ggplot() +
    geom_vline(aes(xintercept = 1), linetype=2) +
    geom_point(data = empirical_smr_prev, aes(y=WHO.region, x=or_empirical, color = type2),alpha = 0.5, size=8) +
    stat_pointinterval(data=regionEffectSmrModEst, aes(x=urRatio, y=WHO.region, color=type), .width = 0.95, size=20) +
    scale_color_manual(values = myPal) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits=rev) +
    labs(x = "Urban-to-rural prevalence ratio",
         y = "World region") +
    theme_bw() + theme(legend.title = element_blank(), 
          panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
          legend.position = "bottom") 
```

Change in smear-positive urban-to-rural prevalence ratio over time? Here we include the EM countries, as we don't have regional effects

```{r}
smrtimeEffectMod <- brms::brm(formula = logOR | se(logOR_se, sigma=TRUE) ~ 
                           1 + year_z + (1 + year_z | study.country/id),
                       data = smrModelDF,
                       prior = prior(student_t(7, 0, 1.5), class = Intercept) +
                           prior(normal(0, 10), class = b) +
                           prior(exponential(2), class = sd),
                       family = gaussian(),
                       control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99),
                       backend = "cmdstanr",
                       chains = 4,
                       cores = 4,
                       iter = 4000)
```

```{r}
summary(smrtimeEffectMod)
plot(smrtimeEffectMod)
conditional_effects(smrtimeEffectMod)
```

```{r}

smrtimeEffectModEst <- add_epred_draws(object = smrtimeEffectMod,
                                 newdata=ndTime,
                                 re_formula = NA,
                                 allow_new_levels = TRUE) %>% 
                           mutate(urRatio = exp(.epred),
                           type="Posterior mean and 95% credible interval") 
```

Main estimate

```{r}
smrtimeEffectModEst %>% 
    group_by(year_z) %>% 
    mean_qi(urRatio) %>% 
    mutate(Year = year_z + year_zero_smr) %>%
    select(Year, urRatio, .lower, .upper)
```


```{r}
    smrtimeEffectModEst %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = year_z + year_zero_smr,
               y = urRatio)) +
    stat_lineribbon(.width = 0.95, alpha = 0.5, fill="cadetblue") +
    scale_y_log10(
    labels = c("0.25", "0.5", "1", "2", "4")
  ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(2000, 2025),
    breaks = c(2000, 2005, 2010, 2015, 2020,2025),
    labels = c("2000", "2005", "2010", "2015", "2020", "2025")
  ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 2) +
    labs(y = "Urban-to-rural prevalence ratio",
         x = "Year",
         size = "Log odds of standard error of TB prevalence") +
    theme_bw()  + theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

Annual percentage change

```{r}
smrtimeEffectMod_posterior <- as_draws_df(smrtimeEffectMod)

smrtimeEffectMod_beta_year_draws <- smrtimeEffectMod_posterior$b_year_z

smrtimeEffectMod_annual_pct_draws <- (exp(smrtimeEffectMod_beta_year_draws) - 1) * 100

smrtimeEffectMod_annual_pct_draws %>% 
  mean_qi()
```

What is the posterior probability that the urban-to-rural prevalence ratio exceeded 1 by 2019?

```{r}
smrpost_2024 <-  add_epred_draws(object = smrtimeEffectMod,
                              newdata = tibble(year_z = 2024 - year_zero,
                                               logOR_se =1), 
                                               re_formula = NA)

smrpost_2024 <- smrpost_2024 %>%
  mutate(OR = exp(.epred))

smrprob_OR_gt1 <- mean(smrpost_2024$OR > 1)

smrprob_OR_gt1
```


```{r}

```
